api_mappings.description: The official name of the healthcare facility
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the facility name field

api_mappings.description: 6-digit CMS certification number for the facility
api_mappings.data_location: Find the license record for the matching facility and extract the certification_number field
Find the matching facility and extract the street address from the address object

api_mappings.description: City, state, and ZIP code combined in format: City, ST ZIP
api_mappings.data_location: Find the matching facility and extract city, state, and zip from the address object, then combine them in the format: {city}, {state} {zip}

api_mappings.description: 10-digit National Provider Identifier for the facility
api_mappings.data_location: Find the matching facility and extract the NPI field

api_mappings.description: Email address of the facility administrator
api_mappings.data_location: Find the matching facility and extract the email from the contact object

api_mappings.description: Primary contact phone number for the facility
api_mappings.data_location: Find the matching facility and extract the phone from the contact object

api_mappings.description: Date when the compliance audit was conducted, in MM/DD/YYYY format
api_mappings.data_location: Find the audit record for the matching facility and extract the audit date field

api_mappings.description: Total number of licensed beds at the facility
api_mappings.data_location: Find the matching facility and extract the total_beds field from the capacity object

api_mappings.description: Whether the facility is in compliance (boolean checkbox)
api_mappings.data_location: Find the audit record for the matching facility and extract the compliance_status field

database_mappings.description: Name of auditor conducting survey - must be from the selected facility and authorized to sign CMS-3427 forms
database_mappings.requirements: Employee from this facility who can sign CMS-3427 (can_sign_3427 = 1)

database_mappings.description: Auditor comments - facility-specific compliance statement from the auditor
database_mappings.requirements: Fetch the comments field from the employee record for the matching facility who can sign CMS-3427 (can_sign_3427 = 1)

database_mappings.description: Administrator signature - must be from the selected facility and authorized to sign CMS-3427 forms
database_mappings.requirements: Employee from this facility who can sign CMS-3427 (can_sign_3427 = 1)
